title: Training with Kyle Vlog 5/8/19 Rest day from depression from car breaking down

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a rest day on May 8, 2019, where car trouble (breakdown at an emissions test) derailed his plans and sent him into a depressive slump. He explains why he skipped training, reflects on the mental side of athleticism, and outlines his plan to swim the next day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: it's 100% mental — breaking down mentally kills the ability to train
currently too out of shape to run on flat ground; hill running is easier and preferable
both feel the same, so you might as well overdo it
has natural endurance as long as he's mentally present and not distracted
car issues are a major mood and motivation killer; needs it working at least 50% of the time

transcript.text: So this video is training with Kyle V-Log, because now that's my priority.
And it's like 1240 in the morning on the 9th, so this one's going to be for the 8th.
Yeah, I didn't do shit yesterday, and I don't think I was going to anyway,
Because I just wanted to kind of experiment.
I had too many sore muscles.
My hamstrings were sore, and then my shoulder here was sore, a little bit sore, but not that much sore.
But that was enough of a reason to not do anything, because it was raining,
And it was like fucking sub-40 degrees outside, and I couldn't do anything anyway.
Yeah, I didn't want to swim, and I didn't want to, because I liked my shoulder, and then I couldn't run.
Like, I literally can't fucking run, and I wasn't going to ride the bike on there.
So I figured I'd do errands.
So I did some errands.
I rode my bike down to the thing to get the permission to drive the car,
And then I drove the car to the emissions, but then the fucking thing broke down at emissions, man.
So I had to have it towed to the goddamn car mechanic, and that totally broke me.
That depressed me.
As far as training goes, you know, being an athlete, I mean, not like I've ever even tried to be an athlete before.
I wasn't ever allowed to, but in the time when I was motivated.
But you, it's all, it's 100% mental, you know.
And today I just cracked mentally, because whenever something happens to my car,
Like one thing with my car where nobody can fix it, which is what's happening now,
Sometimes it just doesn't turn over whenever it wants to, and nobody knows what's going on.
It just broke me.
So, yeah, but that's fine, because I just went and worked on my website,
Stuff that I had working on, wanting to work on for years and years and years and years,
My timeline with the castles.
So, yeah, that's all I did today.
But my strategy, it's going to fucking snow tomorrow.
It's snowing right now.
It's going to snow all day tomorrow.
So I think I'm just going to swim tomorrow.
I physically can't run, and I'm not so sure I want to ride, but maybe I will.
But, yeah, I'll definitely swim tomorrow, because I didn't do anything today.
Over the last two days, actually.
Yeah, but when I do run, the strategy of running, because I can't run on the flats,
Like I literally can't run.
All I can do is trot, because I'm that out of shape.
Luckily for me, I have mountains, and running in the mountains is 100 million times easier
Than running on the flats, because I can't run because I can't bound.
But you can't bound when you're going uphill.
I explained this in my vlog today.
So, you know, I might as well just kind of trot a little bit up the mountain,
And then I can bounce down the mountain.
So I can feel like I'm actually in shape when I'm going up, down, up, down.
And endurance is one thing that I have, as long as I'm in it mentally.
You know, I'm not, like, distracted by something.
Like, my car not working, and nobody can figure out why it's not working.
Something that'll, like, give me the heebie-jeebies inside.
So, yeah, as long as I'm mentally there, I can go all day long.
So I'm going to try that as soon as the fucking snow stops.
It's ridiculous.
It's May, and it's fucking wintertime.
So, yeah, I'm going to do the swimming tomorrow.
And, yes, I bought Jägermeister.
I drank alcohol and pigged out on Taco Bell today.
But I worked on my timeline.
Yeah, it's kind of, like I said yesterday, it's kind of a,
I'm in a weird situation that's unique in that I can't really tell the difference
Between being overtrained and undertrained because it's the same exact feeling.
I feel like shit either way.
So you might as well just overdo it, overdo yourself.
So, yeah, but for some reason I didn't get around to trying to put
Audiobook on my AP3 player that's for the underground, underwater.
So I think I'll just listen to music.
I kind of need the motivation anyway.
But, yeah, but I did manage to sleep yesterday.
I didn't sleep at all the night before.
And then, like, the night before last, it was only three hours of sleep a night.
And so, but I think I did sleep last night.
I don't, I don't, it wasn't that much, maybe four or five hours.
But so tonight I'm going to go to sleep and get up whenever I get up.
And, yeah, and then go swimming.
And I'll have this, I have my vision going for my, what I need to do for my timeline.
So I'll do that.
I don't think, I don't know.
I could do it on my bicycle, but I don't know if I will.
So, um, um, so anyways, that's the V-log for today.
Drain and didn't do shit, but, but I have a good excuse.
It's because of my car, fucking car, man.
I need to get my car to a point where it, where it works, um, at least 50% of the time.
And once that, my mood goes up really quickly.
All right, peace out.
Talk to you tomorrow.
